Text.Page:
Kelsaik is not dead!

Some vestige of divine spirit remains inside that ferocious body and keeps a resurrective flame burning. It will take a stronger force to eliminate the resurrective flame and ensure the safety of this world. Gather a team of 20 and go destroy Kelsaik at the Ebon Tower in the Vale of Spires.
We can all feel safer for your efforts. Thank you for your help.
